title: OVERCOOKED!
description: turn raw ore blocks to ingot block forms!
body:
OVERCOOKED! takes smelting to a whole new level, letting you maximize your efficiency by smelting entire raw ore blocks into full blocks of ingots. Forget the hassle of processing individual ores—now you can fill your furnaces and blast furnaces for ultimate resource conversion.

Key Features:
Streamlined Gameplay: Simplifies ore processing, saving time and inventory space.
Furnace and Blast Furnace Compatible: Use your existing setups without any extra hassle.

OVERCOOKED! is the perfect addition to your Minecraft world, helping you stay efficient and focused on building your dream creations!
